Welcome to Attune

The app that finally
understands your body

Your complete guide to training, nutrition, recovery, and cycle tracking covering everything for women 35+.

Home

Your daily command centre

Every morning Attune greets you with a personalised readiness score and a message from your AI coach built around how you slept, felt, and what your cycle is doing today.

  • Readiness score from 0 to 10 based on your morning check-in
  • AI coach message tailored to your energy, stress, and cycle phase
  • Quick links to today's workout, meals, cycle, and progress
  • Check-in window runs 5am to 12pm so your data is always fresh
Cycle Tracker

Train with your cycle,
not against it

Attune maps your entire month and tells you exactly what your body needs at each phase covering training, nutrition, energy, and mood. Your cycle is not a limitation. It is your greatest performance tool.

Menstrual
Rest and restore. Iron-rich foods. Low intensity movement only.
Follicular
Peak habit-building window. High energy. Push harder this week.
Ovulatory
Strength peak. Your best performance window of the month.
Luteal
Moderate effort. Higher carb need. Start winding down.
Train

A workout plan built
around your body

Your AI-generated programme accounts for your goals, equipment, experience level, injuries, and cycle phase. Intensity automatically adjusts each week based on where you are in your cycle.

  • 4-week progressive programme, regenerated every month
  • Intensity adapts in real time to your daily readiness score
  • Equipment-specific exercises full gym, home, or bodyweight
  • Injury rules built in so nothing aggravates old problems
Active Workout

Every rep tracked,
every set logged

When you start a session, Attune walks you through each exercise with a video demonstration. Log your weight and reps as you go and your history builds automatically so you always know what to beat next time.

  • Exercise video plays behind your live set tracker
  • Log weight in kg and reps for every set
  • Add a note to any exercise if needed
  • Navigate freely between exercises at your own pace
Meals

Nutrition that knows
your hormones

Your 7-day meal plan uses carb cycling to match your energy output each day. Higher carbs on training days, lower on rest days. Every meal shows your protein, carbs, and fat targets with a full ingredient list.

  • Macro rings show protein, carbs, and fat at a glance
  • Carb cycling adapts automatically between training and rest days
  • Full ingredient list per meal with exact amounts in grams
  • Tap any meal to swap ingredients you do not like
  • Weekly grocery list generated automatically every Sunday
Restore

Recovery is part
of the programme

The Restore tab is your wellbeing space. Walk and Learn pairs low-cortisol cardio with audiobooks and podcasts matched to your current cycle phase. Breathwork, supplements, sleep, and education all live here too.

  • Walk and Learn recommends content matched to your phase
  • Breathwork sessions for stress and nervous system regulation
  • Supplement guide based on your health profile and conditions
  • Sleep protocols and hormone education library
Progress

Watch yourself
transform

The Progress tab plots your readiness, sleep, energy, and stress over 30 days with cycle phase colours overlaid. Upload your blood work and Attune's AI analyses your hormones and refines your entire programme around the results.

  • 30-day readiness graph with cycle phase colour overlay
  • Day streak, total check-ins, and average readiness score
  • Progress photos every 4 weeks to see your transformation
  • AI blood work analysis adjusts your full programme automatically
  • Workout history and personal bests tracked over time
Your Profile

Built around you,
from day one

Everything Attune generates starts with your profile. Keep it up to date and your programme stays accurate as your body, goals, and life change over time.

  • Personal details including age, height, and weight
  • Cycle settings: last period date, cycle length, and period length
  • Goals, activity level, training days, and equipment access
  • Health conditions, injuries, and dietary preferences
  • Changes save instantly with no save button needed

You are already
in the right place

Take 5 minutes to complete your profile and let Attune generate your first plan.

Open Attune on iPhone
